MED_WEEK: What week of the meditation program are you currently in?
MED_SESSIONS: How many times did you formal meditation practice over the past week? ____ times
MED_SESSIONDURATION: What was the average duration of each meditation session? ____ minutes (please give estimate, not range)
MAQ_3:
Please tick the appropriate box (Never - Always) to indicate how much of each of the following were true for you over the past week.

 
When meditating, how much of the time: - was your attention focused on what you intended to focus on (body, breath, sounds etc.)?
MAQ_4:
Please tick the appropriate box (Never - Always) to indicate how much of each of the following were true for you over the past week.

 
When meditating, how much of the time: - were you noticing when you were getting distracted?
MAQ_5:
Please tick the appropriate box (Never - Always) to indicate how much of each of the following were true for you over the past week.

 
When meditating, how much of the time: - were you practicing an accepting attitude toward what you were experiencing?
MAQ_6:
Please tick the appropriate box (Never - Always) to indicate how much of each of the following were true for you over the past week.

 
When meditating, how much of the time: - were you practicing being gentle and compassionate toward yourself?

MED_CONTENT: How are you feeling this week about meditation practice? - Contented
MED_ANX: How are you feeling this week about meditation practice? - Anxious
MED_INTEREST: How are you feeling this week about meditation practice? - Interested

BELIEF_CONTENT: Do you believe that your meditation practices this past week have contributed to how you feel? - Contented

MED_IMPROVING: Do you feel your meditation practice is improving in any way?
MED_IMPROVING_FREE: In what areas do you feel your meditation practice is improving?
MED_WORSE: Do you feel your meditation practice is worsening in any way?
MED_WORSE_FREE: In what areas do you feel your meditation practice is worsening?
MED_THOUGHTS: In your experience this past week, how much would you agree with the following statements: - Thoughts are not facts.
MED_FACEDIFFICULTY: In your experience this past week, how much would you agree with the following statements: - I turn towards, rather than away from, difficulty.
MED_THOUGHTVSBODY: In your experience this past week, how much of the time have you spent in your thoughts versus your body?
MED_STRATEGIES: Have you applied new strategies or approaches from the meditation course to manage experiences this week? (e.g., challenging, distressing, or difficult events, thoughts, feelings, or bodily sensations)
MED_STRATEGIES_FREE: Please describe the strategies or approaches you used. Optionally, provide an example of your experience.
MINDSET_NONJUDGE: Please rate yourself on the following mindset characteristics this week: - Non-judging (avoiding judgments based on the sense of personal and especially moral standards)
MINDSET_BEGINNER: Please rate yourself on the following mindset characteristics this week: - Beginnerâ€™s mind (e.g., attitude of openness, eagerness, and lack of preconceptions)

MINDSET_PATIENCE: Please rate yourself on the following mindset characteristics this week: - Patience
MINDSET_NONSTRIVE: Please rate yourself on the following mindset characteristics this week: - Non-striving (e.g., attitude of being rather than doing)
